name: Demalo Black
description:
__Height:__ 245 cm (8'0")
__Affiliation:__ Fake Straw Hat Crew
__First Appearance:__ Chapter 598 

"Three-Tongued" Demalo Black is the captain of the Impostor Straw Hat Pirates and the main antagonist for the Return to Sabaody Arc. He impersonated Monkey D. Luffy to benefit from his reputation.
